More than monitoring

A licensed electrician is watching.
Before it becomes an emergency.

CLiDE isn't a gadget that beeps and leaves you guessing. The licensed electricians who installed it watch your panel — and when CLiDE flags something serious, we reach out. The point is to catch problems early, so you're not making the panicked emergency call at all. And if you do need us, it's one tap in the app — we already have your panel data and we already know your house.

  • A real person watches your alerts — we reach out when it's critical
  • One tap in the app to request service — your data already in hand
  • We catch problems early — so you skip the emergency call entirely
  • Installed and backed by PowerMeans Electric — licensed master electricians
Patent-pending · First of its kind

Nobody else has this.
You could be among the first.

CLiDE is a brand-new, patent-pending invention (USPTO #64/075,336) — circuit-level AI detection that doesn't exist anywhere else. Not a smart plug, not another energy app. The first system that learns your home's electrical fingerprint and catches failures before they happen. Founders members aren't just early customers — they're among the first homes in the country to have it.

MONITORING LIVE
Meet CLIDE

The AI that
knows your home.

CLIDE — Circuit-Level Intelligence Detection Engine — runs 24/7 on a dedicated Mac Mini at your location. It doesn't compare your home to averages. It learns your specific circuits and flags what matters.

ALWAYS ON ON-PREMISE AI YOUR PANEL ONLY PLAIN ENGLISH LOCAL DATA
CLIDE
Monitoring 18 circuits
Why is my bill so high this month?
Your HVAC compressor has been running 34% longer than baseline over the past 10 days. Power factor on Circuit 7 dropped from 0.91 to 0.67 — the compressor is working harder than it should. I'd recommend servicing it before it fails completely.
Included with every subscription

Plus a personal AI that
actually remembers you.

Every CLiDE subscription includes a private AI assistant powered by Anthropic's Claude — with memory that carries across every conversation. Ask it anything: your home, your circuits, or whatever's on your mind. Unlike the AI tools you're paying for now, CLiDE remembers what you told it last week. Many customers find they don't need a separate AI subscription at all.

Your home, in your pocket

See everything. Tap once for help.

Live consumption, every circuit, every alert — on your phone. See that purple button? That's PowerMeans, always one tap away — connecting you straight to the team that knows your house.

Coming soon Google Play

Free to download — activates after your CLiDE install.

How it works

Installed in 90 minutes.
Always monitoring.

No panel replacement. No rewiring. A licensed PowerMeans electrician installs the hardware and you're live the same day.

01
We install circuit-level sensors
CT clamps attach to your existing wiring. No rewiring, no panel replacement — typically 60–90 minutes start to finish.
02
CLIDE starts learning your home
Over 2–4 weeks, CLIDE builds a baseline for every circuit — what's normal for your HVAC, water heater, and kitchen. Your panel, specifically.
03
You get plain-English alerts
When CLIDE detects an anomaly, you get an alert that explains what it found and what to do — not raw data, not error codes.
04
One tap connects you to PowerMeans
Request service directly from the app. We detect the problem and fix it. One provider, one tap.

What you get

Everything your panel
should have told you.

⚡
Real-time circuit monitoring
Live wattage, voltage, and current on every circuit. See exactly what's drawing power and when.
🧠
AI anomaly detection
CLIDE learns your home's normal patterns and flags deviations — not generic thresholds, your panel specifically.
📱
Mobile app
Dashboard, alert history, and direct CLIDE chat — all in a clean app on your phone.
🔧
Integrated service dispatch
Request service from the same screen as the alert. We detect the problem and fix it.
🏠
No panel replacement
Works on any existing panel. CT clamps install in 60–90 minutes. No rewiring, no permits.
💬
Ask CLIDE anything
Natural language answers about your energy, alerts, and what they mean for your home.
Pricing

No mystery pricing.
Here's exactly what you pay for.

One installation fee. Try it free for 90 days. Then a flat monthly rate — no contracts, no hidden fees.

What's included
  • The Refoss energy meter (~$170 — you could buy it yourself; we install it right)
  • The CLiDE Brain — the device that runs the AI on-site, 24/7
  • Licensed master electrician install — about 90 minutes, done right
Install
$399 one-time
includes everything to get started
  • Refoss EM16P circuit monitor (yours to keep)
  • CLiDE Brain on-site device (installed by PowerMeans Electric)
  • 90 days free monitoring included
Monthly
$29/month
after 90 days
  • Cancel anytime
  • Keep your Refoss monitor if you cancel
  • CLiDE Brain device is returned to PowerMeans

Professional installation by PowerMeans Electric, Dripping Springs TX · myclide.com

No lock-in. Cancel anytime and keep the Refoss meter — it's yours, use the free Refoss app. We simply collect the CLiDE Brain. No penalty, no equipment to return. We think you'll be back.

Stop finding out after it breaks.

Get CLiDE installed on your panel. 90 minutes to install. 90 days free.
